rules.rule_text:
title: Cab File Extraction Via Wusa.EXE
id: 59b39960-5f9d-4a49-9cef-1e4d2c1d0cb9
related:
- id: c74c0390-3e20-41fd-a69a-128f0275a5ea
  type: derived
status: test
description: 'Detects execution of the "wusa.exe" (Windows Update Standalone Installer)
  utility to extract cab using the "/extract" argument that is no longer supported.

  '
references:
- https://web.archive.org/web/20180331144337/https://www.fireeye.com/blog/threat-research/2018/03/sanny-malware-delivery-method-updated-in-recently-observed-attacks.html
author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
date: 2022-08-04
modified: 2024-08-15
tags:
- attack.execution
- detection.threat-hunting
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \wusa.exe
    CommandLine|contains: '/extract:'
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- The "extract" flag still works on older 'wusa.exe' versions, which could be a legitimate
  use (monitor the path of the cab being extracted)
level: medium
